nasb.text: For the Lord takes pleasure in His people; He will beautify the afflicted ones with salvation.

esv.text: For the Lord  takes pleasure in his people; he adorns the humble with salvation.

cnv.text: 因為耶和華喜悅自己的子民， 以救恩給謙卑的人作裝飾。

ccb.text: 因为耶和华喜爱祂的子民， 祂赐尊荣给谦卑的人， 使他们得胜。

csbs.text: 因为耶和华喜悦他的子民， 他使卑微人以救恩为装饰。
